items.headline: Add Chicago's Festival Calendar Here
items.summary: Once the daily content job is live, this card will surface the week's actual festivals and street fairs pulled from Choose Chicago's event calendar.

items.headline: New Restaurant Openings
items.summary: This card will surface recent restaurant openings and closings from Chicago food press once the daily job is connected.

items.headline: Local Chicago News
items.summary: This card will surface top local Chicago headlines relevant to new residents (transit, weather, city services).

items.headline: CPS and District Announcements
items.summary: This card will surface Chicago Public Schools enrollment deadlines and announcements relevant to relocating families.

items.headline: What's Playing This Week
items.summary: This card will surface current entertainment listings — theater, live music, comedy — from Time Out Chicago and WTTW once the daily job is connected.
